scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(true) sets trackPosition to true and returns this (branch-true)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as original; parser.isTrackPosition() returns true
pseudocode: TEST TC01 setTrackPosition enables position tracking

scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(false) sets trackPosition to false and returns this (branch-false)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as original; parser.isTrackPosition() returns false
pseudocode: TEST TC02 setTrackPosition disables position tracking
